# MViewer Testdata Fixture Catalog

Auto-generated by `testdata/generate_fixtures.py`. Do not edit manually.

## Golden Images

Valid reference images in multiple formats and sizes. All patterns are
deterministically generated from seed `0xDEADBEEF`.

### 64x64 (tiny)

| File | Format | Pattern | Description |
|------|--------|---------|-------------|
| `64x64/gradient_64x64.{png,jpg,bmp,tiff}` | all | gradient | Diagonal RGB ramp: R=x, G=y, B=(x+y)/2 |
| `64x64/flat_color_64x64.{png,jpg,bmp,tiff}` | all | flat_color | Solid warm red (200,80,80) |
| `64x64/checker_64x64.{png,jpg,bmp,tiff}` | all | checker | 8px black/white checkerboard |
| `64x64/noise_64x64.{png,jpg,bmp,tiff}` | all | noise | Seeded pseudorandom grayscale |
| `64x64/photo_like_64x64.{png,jpg,bmp,tiff}` | all | photo_like | Multi-octave sinusoids + subtle noise |

## Corrupted Images

Intentionally broken files for testing error handling and decoder robustness.

| File | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `truncated_50pct_64x64.jpg` | JPEG | Truncated at 50% of original size |
| `truncated_90pct_64x64.jpg` | JPEG | Truncated at 90% (missing EOI marker) |
| `wrong_magic_png_as_jpg_64x64.jpg` | JPEG | PNG data in .jpg container |
| `empty_64x64.png` | PNG | Zero-byte file |
| `all_zeros_64x64.bmp` | BMP | Correct size, all-zero pixel data |
| `truncated_header_64x64.bmp` | BMP | Only 10 bytes (truncated header) |
| `bad_ihdr_dimensions_64x64.png` | PNG | Zero width/height in IHDR chunk |
| `wrong_byteorder_64x64.tiff` | TIFF | Flipped byte order marker (II↔MM) |
| `bitflip_in_scan_64x64.jpg` | JPEG | Single bit-flip in scan data |
| `bad_idat_crc_64x64.png` | PNG | IDAT chunk with invalid CRC |
| `truncated_50pct_256x256.jpg` | JPEG | Truncated at 50% of original size |
| `truncated_90pct_256x256.jpg` | JPEG | Truncated at 90% (missing EOI marker) |
| `wrong_magic_png_as_jpg_256x256.jpg` | JPEG | PNG data in .jpg container |
| `empty_256x256.png` | PNG | Zero-byte file |
| `all_zeros_256x256.bmp` | BMP | Correct size, all-zero pixel data |
| `truncated_header_256x256.bmp` | BMP | Only 10 bytes (truncated header) |
| `bad_ihdr_dimensions_256x256.png` | PNG | Zero width/height in IHDR chunk |
| `wrong_byteorder_256x256.tiff` | TIFF | Flipped byte order marker (II↔MM) |
| `bitflip_in_scan_256x256.jpg` | JPEG | Single bit-flip in scan data |
| `bad_idat_crc_256x256.png` | PNG | IDAT chunk with invalid CRC |
